full_text:
Zhao Bing (Gong’a) 趙炳 (公阿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Bing (趙炳), styledGong’a (公阿), was born in Guangling. Worked to cure people. After his master’s death, went east and was worshipped for his skills.
